subcodes.first_line: O Leaf of My Lote-Tree and O Leaf of My Paradise! Thou hast ever been, and art still, favoured by the grace of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ورقته سدرتی و یا ورقته فردوسی لازال بعنایت حق فائز بوده و هستی
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day
